strategy: Frozen backbone, classifier head fine-tuned on PlantDoc train (2246 images, 3 epochs)

plantvillage_val.note: Catastrophic forgetting in classifier head — 10/38 classes have no PlantDoc equivalent

analysis.finding: Fine-tuning improved cross-domain performance but caused classifier drift on original domain
analysis.cause: Classifier head updated with PlantDoc visual patterns; 10/38 PV classes never reinforced
analysis.recommendation: Consider lower learning rate (0.0001), more epochs, or knowledge distillation to preserve PV accuracy
